answer:
We have:

- \( o(11.6) \) is the least odd integer greater than 11.6 → 13  
- \( e(-10.4) \) is the least even integer greater than -10.4 → -10  
- \( o(-9.2) \) is the greatest odd integer less than -9.2 → -11  
- \( e(9.5) \) is the greatest even integer less than 9.5 → 8  

Sum: \( 13 + (-10) + (-11) + 8 = 0 \).  

\boxed{C}
